title: Agentic Engineering
description: Build, orchestrate, and secure autonomous AI agents for real-world software delivery using Google Antigravity and the Tridorian standard.

courses.title: AGY-101: Secure Agentic Development: Installation & Setup (L100)
courses.description: Welcome to the foundational session of Google Antigravity (AGY). Before we can orchestrate AI agents to write code or execute terminal commands, we must establish a secure, working environment.

courses.title: Gemini CLI Deep Dive
courses.description: Advanced command-line AI orchestration with Gemini. Learn to leverage CLI tools for automated workflows and pipeline integration.
